news.title: Anatomy of the India LPG crisis and how to tackle it -- explained
news.india_relevance: Directly explains the breakdown of India's domestic energy supply chain due to West Asia tensions.
news.why_it_matters: Provides a deep dive into the logistics of LPG imports and why the current disruption is hitting Indian kitchens and SMEs uniquely hard.

news.title: India’s Real Energy Crisis Isn’t In The Gulf. It’s The Lack Of Political Will At Home
news.india_relevance: Critiques India's domestic energy policy and its failure to build strategic reserves or diversify effectively.
news.why_it_matters: Argues that structural policy failures, rather than just external shocks, are the root cause of India's recurring energy vulnerability.

news.title: Economic Survey promises, impact of new labour codes
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the long-awaited implementation of labour reforms that will govern the Indian workforce.
news.why_it_matters: The new codes will fundamentally change hiring, firing, and social security obligations for Indian startups and established industries alike.

news.title: New LCR norms could help banks expand credit by 7%
news.india_relevance: Relates to the Reserve Bank of India's liquidity coverage ratio rules for domestic banks.
news.why_it_matters: Changes in liquidity rules directly dictate how much capital banks can deploy into the economy, impacting interest rates and credit availability.

news.title: US launches Section 301 probe into India, 15 others over ‘excess capacity’
news.india_relevance: A major trade policy move by the US targeting Indian manufacturing and export practices.
news.why_it_matters: This could lead to punitive tariffs on Indian goods, complicating the 'Make in India' export narrative and trade relations with the US.

news.title: How smartphones became India’s largest export category in 2025
news.india_relevance: Tracks the structural shift in India's export basket from raw materials to high-value electronics.
news.why_it_matters: Validates the success of the PLI scheme and signals India's growing role in the global electronics supply chain.

news.title: MNC banks resist RBI plan to access offshore deal data
news.india_relevance: A regulatory tug-of-war between India's central bank and global financial institutions.
news.why_it_matters: RBI's push for data localization and oversight of offshore transactions reflects a broader trend of tightening financial sovereignty.

news.title: The Iran War Puts India’s Dosa and AI Dreams on Ice - Bloomberg.com
news.india_relevance: Connects the Middle East conflict to both rural consumption (food) and high-tech aspirations in India.
news.why_it_matters: Illustrates how geopolitical shocks derail both basic consumption and the capital flows needed for India's tech transition.

news.title: Supreme Court rap puts spotlight on RERA's weak links
news.india_relevance: Judicial intervention in India's primary real estate regulatory framework.
news.why_it_matters: Highlights the enforcement failures of RERA, which is critical for protecting homebuyer interests and ensuring real estate sector transparency.

news.title: Indian fertilizers’ Hormuz choke
news.india_relevance: Focuses on the supply chain of critical agricultural inputs for Indian farmers.
news.why_it_matters: A disruption in fertilizer imports could lead to higher food prices and impact the upcoming sowing season, affecting rural stability.

news.title: High-Level Committee on Banking may suggest review of CRR, SLR, licensing norms
news.india_relevance: Potential overhaul of the foundational rules governing Indian banking.
news.why_it_matters: Changes to CRR/SLR are the most potent tools for monetary transmission; a review suggests a shift in how RBI manages systemic liquidity.

news.title: IT services deal wins climb to five-month high in February
news.india_relevance: A lead indicator for the health of India's largest private-sector employer and forex earner.
news.why_it_matters: Signals a potential recovery in global enterprise spending, which is vital for the growth of Indian IT giants and mid-caps.

news.title: Business rejigs, layoffs drive up demand for outplacement firms
news.india_relevance: Reflects the changing nature of the white-collar job market in India.
news.why_it_matters: Indicates that Indian corporates are moving toward more active workforce management and restructuring amid economic uncertainty.

news.title: India-bound crude crosses Hormuz on the sly - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: Details the clandestine methods being used to maintain India's energy security.
news.why_it_matters: Shows the extreme measures and increased costs Indian refiners are undertaking to bypass the West Asia conflict zones.

news.title: Preparing India for a true innovation-led economy
news.india_relevance: A strategic analysis of India's R&D and intellectual property landscape.
news.why_it_matters: Discusses the structural changes needed to move India from a service-hub to a global innovation leader.

news.title: Fixed tenures may be next for upper-layer NBFC chiefs under new norms
news.india_relevance: Governance reforms for India's shadow banking sector.
news.why_it_matters: Aims to professionalize NBFC management and reduce promoter-driven risks in a sector that has seen major failures recently.

news.title: Russian ‘shadow fleet’ tankers divert to India after US waiver on crude imports
news.india_relevance: Explains the complex geopolitics of India's oil sourcing.
news.why_it_matters: India's ability to navigate US sanctions while sourcing cheap Russian oil remains a critical factor in managing domestic inflation.

news.title: India ranks third globally in fintech funding; Rs 221.6 billion raised in 2025, says report
news.india_relevance: Benchmarks the maturity and attractiveness of India's startup ecosystem.
news.why_it_matters: Confirms that despite a global funding winter, India remains a top destination for capital in the financial technology space.

news.title: NSE appoints 20 merchant bankers, 8 law firms for proposed IPO

news.why_it_matters: The listing of the country’s premier exchange will be a landmark event for Indian capital markets and corporate governance.

news.title: Retail inflation rose to 3.21% in February, war impact likely from next month
news.india_relevance: The primary metric for RBI's interest rate decisions in India.
